class.help: Tabla codificadora de Idiomas, en donde se registrará para cada uno el Código, la Descripción Observaciones.
class.label: Idioma
class.name: IDIOMA

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_idioma as oi_idioma, t0.c_idioma as c_idioma, t0.d_idioma as d_idioma, SEC.policy, t0.c_idioma as CODE, t0.d_idioma as TEXT FROM ORG20_IDIOMAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Idiomas.IDIOMA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_idioma LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_idioma asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_idioma as oi_idioma, SEC.policy FROM ORG20_IDIOMAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Idiomas.IDIOMA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_idioma LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_idioma asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Código del Idioma. Puede ser un alfanumérico de hasta 30 caracteres.
attribute.label: Código
attribute.name: c_idioma

attribute.description: Descripción del Idioma. Puede ser un alfanumérico de hasta 100 caracteres.
attribute.label: Descripción
attribute.name: d_idioma

attribute.description: Observaciones del Idioma. Puede ser un alfanumérico de hasta 1000 caracteres.
attribute.label: Observaciones
attribute.name: o_idioma

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Idiomas.IDIOMA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Idiomas.IDIOMA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(ORG20_IDIOMAS.oi_idioma) as CNT from ORG20_IDIOMAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ORG20_IDIOMAS.oi_idioma={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ORG20_IDIOMAS.d_idioma,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ORG20_IDIOMAS.c_idioma,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG20_IDIOMAS.oi_idioma, ORG20_IDIOMAS.d_idioma as d_idioma FROM ORG20_IDIOMAS ORDER BY d_idioma ASC ')ROWS/ROW
